allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./server/routes/rooms.js'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('rooms.js OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)" && node -e "import\('./server/routes/search.js'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('search.js OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/meetings | node -e "const d=[];process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d.push\(c\)\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(d\)\);console.log\('success:', j.success\);console.log\('total:', j.total\);console.log\('data count:', j.data?.length\);j.data?.forEach\(\(m,i\)=>console.log\(' ',i+1,m.id,m.title\)\)}\)")
